items.title: GXO Logistics, Inc. (GXO): A Bull Case Theory
items.description: We came across a bullish thesis on GXO Logistics, Inc. on DeepValue Capital’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on GXO. GXO Logistics, Inc.’s share was trading at $57.56 as of January 28th. GXO’s trailing and forward P/E were 76.75 and 19.19 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. GXO Logistics (GXO) is the world’s largest […]

items.title: Rolls-Royce Pushes Trent 1000 XE to Win Back 787 Customers
items.description: Engine maker enters active sales mode as it targets new and returning deals on Boeing's 787 Dreamliner program.

items.title: The Boeing Company (BA): A Bull Case Theory

items.title: Boeing Targets April First Flight For 777X
Ryanair's Traffic Numbers for January 2026 Improve Year Over Year
items.description: RYAAY carried 12.7M passengers in January 2026, up 2% year over year, with load factor flat year over year at 91%.
